title: Kumbh Mela fame Monalisa, husband Farmaan deny underage marriage claim; Kerala HC grants couple interim relief
description: The Kerala High Court recently granted interim protection from arrest to Kumbh Mela fame Monalisa Bhosle's husband Mohd Farmaan Khan, in a kidnapping case reportedly filed on allegations that Bhosle is a minor and was kidnapped by Farmaan [Moh Farmaan & anr v State of Kerala & ors].In a petition filed last month before the Court, the couple asserted that Bhosle turned 18 years old in January this year and was an adult when she married Farmaan in March. They, therefore, sought antici
